content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix_skew
C: webhook_verify ∧ "300" ∧ "401" ∧ edge_reject
P: widen_window ∧ provider_skew_only ∧ min_fix ∧ reg_test
V: valid_webhook_accepted ∧ stale_still_401
A: bump_tolerance ∧ add_skew_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix_skew.
Constraints: webhook_verify and "300" and "401" and edge_reject.
Plan: widen_window and provider_skew_only and min_fix and reg_test.
Verify: valid_webhook_accepted and stale_still_401.
Answer target: bump_tolerance and add_skew_test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: min_fix
C: overdue_middleware ∧ "402" ∧ charge_loop
P: overdue⇒402 ∧ grace ∧ "24h" ∧ boundary_guard
V: no_loop ∧ reg_test ∧ grace_exact
A: patch_middleware ∧ add_reg_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: min_fix.
Constraints: overdue_middleware and "402" and charge_loop.
Plan: overdue implies 402 and grace and "24h" and boundary_guard.
Verify: no_loop and reg_test and grace_exact.
Answer target: patch_middleware and add_reg_test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: modular_monolith
C: team="9" ∧ ddl="12 weeks" ∧ store="PostgreSQL" ∧ ops=platform_plus_sec ∧ traffic=steady ∧ split=compliance_ready
P: single_deploy ∧ clear_modules ∧ shared_db ∧ fast_delivery
V: fits_team_size ∧ meets_deadline ∧ compliance_boundaries
A: ship_monolith ∧ enforce_module_seams ∧ use_postgres

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: deliver_arch
C: team:"6" ∧ ddl:"9 weeks" ∧ store:"PostgreSQL" ∧ pt_mlops ∧ async_enrichment
P: worker_sidecar ∧ postgres_queue ∧ reuse_stack
V: fits_team ∧ meets_ddl ∧ low_ops
A: default_arch ∧ short_why

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_risk
C: file_download_handler ∧ "download" ∧ user_input_path
P: path_traversal ∧ ".." ∧ unsanitized_concat
V: resolve_path ∧ enforce_base_dir ∧ reject_traversal
A: sanitize_input ∧ validate_path ∧ test_traversal

[AUDIT]
Goal: mitigate_risk.
Constraints: file_download_handler and "download" and user_input_path.
Plan: path_traversal and ".." and unsanitized_concat.
Verify: resolve_path and enforce_base_dir and reject_traversal.
Answer target: sanitize_input and validate_path and test_traversal.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_sqli
C: "SELECT" ∧ "sort" ∧ invoice_admin_api ∧ user_input_concat
P: sql_injection ∧ order_by_tainted ∧ data_exfiltration
V: whitelist_sort_column ∧ parameterize_query ∧ reject_unknown_keys
A: static_scan ∧ inject_payload_test ∧ audit_query_logs

[AUDIT]
Goal: mitigate_sqli.
Constraints: "SELECT" and "sort" and invoice_admin_api and user_input_concat.
Plan: sql_injection and order_by_tainted and data_exfiltration.
Verify: whitelist_sort_column and parameterize_query and reject_unknown_keys.
Answer target: static_scan and inject_payload_test and audit_query_logs.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_reconcileBatch
C: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ "next(err)" ∧ minimal_change
P: load_batch ∧ db.fetchRows ∧ apply_rules ∧ db.save ∧ emit_metrics
V: order_preserved ∧ db_err_to_next ∧ anchors_verbatim
A: async_await_wrap ∧ try_catch ∧ "next(err)" ∧ preserve_signature

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor_reconcileBatch.
Constraints: "async" and "await" and "next(err)" and minimal_change.
Plan: load_batch and db.fetchRows and apply_rules and db.save and emit_metrics.
Verify: order_preserved and db_err_to_next and anchors_verbatim.
Answer target: async_await_wrap and try_catch and "next(err)" and preserve_signature.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_loadGatewayUser
C: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ "next(err)" ∧ minimal_change
P: session_check ∧ db.findUser ∧ flags.load ∧ audit.log ∧ next
V: order_preserved ∧ db_err_forwards_"next(err)" ∧ async_await_used
A: wrap_async ∧ await_each_step ∧ try_catch→"next(err)" ∧ preserve_next
